subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who is alone in His Essence through His Essence, sanctified in His Being through His Being, and exalted in His Reality through His Reality [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی توحد بذاته لذاته و تقدس بنفسه لنفسه و تنزه بکینونته لکینونته و
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @knowledge; recognition of God
